title: PDGC-2026
content: PDGC-2026 main 2026 Ninth International Conference on Parallel, Distributed and Grid Computing (PDGC-2026) 19-21 November, 2026 Department of Computer Science & Engineering and Information Technology Jaypee University of Information Technology ............... ............... PDGC Home PDGC-2026 Home Committees Technical Program Committee Important Dates Call for Papers Special Sessions Paper Submission Camera Ready Submission Programs Schedule Keynote Speakers Registration Downloads Sponsorship Opportunities Contact Sponsorship Opportunities Sponsorship Opportunities Sponsorship of PDGC-2026 will provide a company or an organization with a unique opportunity to increase its visibility and product awareness within a highly specialized, influential community. Diamond  Sponsorship(Rs.50000) Five  full conference registrations free of cost Two Stalls space for exhibits Inclusion of your company’s name and logo in our web advertising on PDGC-2026 site, linkage to your company website A complimentary pass to the opening reception Acknowledgment in opening address Platinum  Sponsorship(Rs. 30000) Three  full conference registrations free of cost Two Stall space for exhibits Inclusion of your company’s name and logo in our web advertising on PDGC-2026 site, linkage to your company website A complimentary pass to the opening reception Acknowledgment in opening address Gold Sponsorship (Rs. 20000) Two full conference registrations free of cost Two Stall space for exhibits Inclusion of your company’s name and logo in our web advertising on PDGC-2026 site, linkage to your company website A complimentary pass to the opening reception Acknowledgment in opening address Silver Sponsorship (Rs. 15000) Two  full conference registrations free of cost One Stall space for exhibits Inclusion of your company’s name and logo in our web advertising on PDGC-2026 site, linkage to your company website A complimentary pass to the opening reception Acknowledgment in opening address Bronze Sponsorship (Rs. 10000) One full conference registrations free of cost One Stall space for exhibits Inclusion of your company’s name and logo in our web advertising on PDGC-2026 site, linkage to your company website A complimentary pass to the opening reception Acknowledgment in opening address Summary : Sponsorship Type Amount Details Diamond Sponsor 50,000/- Registration of five delegates free of cost  +  space for two exhibition stalls  +  web advertising in PDGC-2026 Platinum Sponsor 30,000/- Registration of three delegates free of cost  +  space for two exhibition stall  +  web advertising in PDGC-2026 Gold Sponsor 20,000/- Registration of two delegates free of cost + space for two exhibition stall  +  web advertising in PDGC-2026 Silver Sponsor 15,000/- Registration of one delegates free of cost + space for two exhibition stall  +  web advertising in PDGC-2026 Bronze Sponsor 10,000/- Registration of one delegate free of cost  +  space for one exhibition stall  +  web advertising in PDGC-2026 The sponsorship amount should be paid in the form of a Demand Draft, drawn in favour of “Jaypee University of Information Technology”, payable at Shimla. Please mention PDGC-2026 at the back side of the Demand Draft. TECHNICAL SPONSOR To be updated.. FINANCIAL SPONSORS SUPPORTERS JUIT IEEE STUDENT BRANCH CONTACT US For information to all, that official email of PDGC-2026 is pdgc2026@juitsolan.in PDGC-2026, juit.ac.in
